vocab.meaning: mua nhanh chóng (thường là món hời hoặc hàng giới hạn)
vocab.example: Whenever there is a flash sale, I try to snap up the latest sneaker releases before they go out of stock.

vocab.meaning: chi một khoản tiền lớn (thường là một cách miễn cưỡng)
vocab.example: I had to fork out a significant amount for shipping fees because the boots were sent from overseas.

vocab.meaning: sàng lọc, kiểm tra kỹ lưỡng giữa nhiều lựa chọn
vocab.example: It took me nearly an hour to sift through hundreds of listings to find a pair that actually met my criteria.

vocab.meaning: gửi trả lại (hàng hóa không vừa hoặc bị lỗi)
vocab.example: The sizing was completely off, so I had to send them back and request a full refund.

vocab.meaning: thử nghiệm (tính năng, sự thoải mái) lần đầu
vocab.example: I'm always a bit hesitant to try out new footwear brands online without knowing their exact fit.

vocab.meaning: vẫn trung thành/tin dùng (một thương hiệu hoặc quyết định)
vocab.example: Despite the delay in delivery, I still stand by that retailer because their quality is consistently superb.

vocab.meaning: chờ đợi, canh chừng (để tìm dịp tốt hoặc mẫu mới)
vocab.example: I usually look out for discount codes or seasonal clearances to save some money on my online purchases.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn (giữa các phương án thay thế)
vocab.example: After comparing several models, I decided to opt for the synthetic leather version due to its durability.

vocab.meaning: mua được cái gì đó (thường là với giá rẻ)
vocab.example: I managed to pick up some classic trainers at a fraction of their original price during the Black Friday sale.
By the time I added the running shoes to my cart, my size had already sold out.
